description: Candidate says 'I didn't quite understand the question' on a technical question — no greeting, no abusive language, just genuine confusion. Judge should clarify, not redirect. From session 70c126b4 turn 435.

judge_input.active_question_text: You're inheriting a portfolio of ~40-50 integrations across cloud and on-prem. In your first 90 days, how would you assess, stabilize, and standardize the estate?
